Distinctions Between Types of Dissolution and Related Braita from Rabbi Shimon
Story of Levi in Bathhouse - Nitmazmeiz of Brain and Implications

Story of Rav Dimi bar Yitzchak Asking for Demonstration - Two Failed Attempts
Debates About Inclusive Language - Ad Ve'ad vs. Ad Velo Ad; Rav Huna, Rav Pappa, Rabbi Yirmiya Questions
Rejection of Bones as Significant - Parasha Treated Like Flesh

macro_segments.title: Spinal Cord in Birds - Extent of Trefah Down the Wings

micro_segments.title: Debate Between Rabbi Yannai and Reish Lakish - Below Wings vs. Until Wings

macro_segments.title: The Liver (HaKaved) - Quantity Requirement and Eating Customs

micro_segments.title: Contradiction in Mishnayot - Mishna Requires Some vs. Later Mishna Requires Kezayit
Resolution via Rabbi Chiyya vs. Rabbi Shimon bar Rabbi - Different Opinions About Liver's Importance
Story of Army Troop and Rabbi Zeira - Context for Kezayit Requirements
Rav Pappa's Ruling - Kezayit Required in Both Locations (At Gallbladder and Where It Lives)
Questions About Kezayit Form - Milaket, Keritua, Merudad, and Niddaldela

Debate - Inner Pierced but Not Outer; Does Outer Protect? Rav Acha vs. Ravina
Testing for Holes - Blowing into Lung and Listening for Air Escape (Avsha)
Water Test for Holes - Placing Blown Lung in Lukewarm Water and Checking for Bubbles

Rabbi Yossi ben HaMeshullam's Stringent Position - Must Crumble When Snapped
Resolution - Redness Without Blood Escaping Can Heal; Lung Protected Inside Body
Gemara Comparison - Exposed Ear vs. Protected Lung; Different Healing Standards
Discolorations (Gildi, Uchmi, Chazusa) - Different Color Spots on Lung Are Kosher
Blisters (Buei) - Cannot Compare Holes in Blister Areas; Ambiguous Holes in Blister Areas Presumed Recent
